Title: Pay without authentication (no 3DS2)
Content:
Skipping authentication (3DS2) requires additional risk checks due to it’s risky nature.

Xendit recommends to perform authentication (3DS2) when the shopper is present, to prevent potential chargebacks.

To enable optional authentication, request Optional 3DS on the Xendit dashboard.

Perform a card payment without 3D Secure. Useful for trusted transactions, or transactions on cards for which authentication (3DS2) is not available. You will not be able to detect whether a card supports 3DS2 before attempting to do 3DS2.
Do take into account that cards from Canada, The United Kingdom and the United States sometimes do not support 3DS2, for these cards we suggest adding billing details to be verified by the address verification service.

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cvn": "123",
      "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "skip_three_ds": true,
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description examples",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Response - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "PAYMENT_ID",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co"
        },
        "billing_information": { // Fill these up for Address Verification Service
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}

If you receive the SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN error, you are not allowed to skip 3DS, request Optional 3DS from the Xendit dashboard.

{
    "error_code": "SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN",
    "message": "Non 3DS card payment requests is not allowed. Please activate the feature on Xendit dashboard before proceeding"
}

To retrieve the payment details (detailed error messages, codes and network_transaction_id) from the transaction, follow how to retrieve authorization data for card payments.

Title: Bayar tanpa autentikasi (tanpa 3DS2)
Content:
Melewatkan autentikasi (3DS2) memerlukan pemeriksaan risiko tambahan karena sifatnya yang berisiko.

Xendit merekomendasikan untuk melakukan autentikasi (3DS2) saat pembeli hadir, untuk mencegah potensi chargebacks.

Untuk mengaktifkan autentikasi opsional, minta Optional 3DS di dasbor Xendit.

Lakukan pembayaran kartu tanpa 3D Secure. Berguna untuk transaksi tepercaya, atau transaksi pada kartu yang autentikasinya (3DS2) tidak tersedia. Anda tidak akan dapat mendeteksi apakah sebuah kartu mendukung 3DS2 sebelum mencoba melakukan 3DS2.
Perlu diingat bahwa kartu dari Kanada, Inggris Raya, dan Amerika Serikat terkadang tidak mendukung 3DS2, untuk kartu-kartu ini kami sarankan untuk menambahkan detail tagihan untuk diverifikasi oleh layanan verifikasi alamat.

Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cvn": "123",
      "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "skip_three_ds": true,
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description examples",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Respons - POST /v3/payment_requests

    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "PAYMENT_ID",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co"

        "billing_information": { // Fill these up for Address Verification Service

Jika Anda menerima error SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN, Anda tidak diizinkan untuk melewati 3DS, mintalah Optional 3DS dari dasbor Xendit.

{
    "error_code": "SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN",
    "message": "Non 3DS card payment requests is not allowed. Please activate the feature on Xendit dashboard before proceeding"
}

Untuk mengambil detail pembayaran (pesan error terperinci, kode, dan network_transaction_id) dari transaksi, ikuti cara mengambil data otorisasi untuk pembayaran kartu.

Title: ชำระเงินโดยไม่ต้องมีการยืนยันตัวตน (ไม่มี 3DS2)
Content:
การข้ามการยืนยันตัวตน (3DS2) จำเป็นต้องมีการตรวจสอบความเสี่ยงเพิ่มเติม เนื่องจากลักษณะที่มีความเสี่ยงสูง

Xendit แนะนำให้ทำการยืนยันตัวตน (3DS2) เมื่อผู้ซื้อสินค้าอยู่ ณ ขณะนั้น เพื่อป้องกัน chargebacks ที่อาจเกิดขึ้น

หากต้องการเปิดใช้งานการยืนยันตัวตนแบบเลือกได้ (optional authentication) ให้ขอเปิดใช้งาน Optional 3DS บน Xendit dashboard

ทำการชำระเงินด้วยบัตรโดยไม่มี 3D Secure มีประโยชน์สำหรับการทำธุรกรรมที่เชื่อถือได้ หรือการทำธุรกรรมด้วยบัตรที่ไม่รองรับการยืนยันตัวตน (3DS2) คุณจะไม่สามารถตรวจจับได้ว่าบัตรใดรองรับ 3DS2 ก่อนที่จะพยายามทำ 3DS2
โปรดคำนึงว่าบัตรจากแคนาดา สหราชอาณาจักร และสหรัฐอเมริกาบางครั้งไม่รองรับ 3DS2 สำหรับบัตรเหล่านี้ เราแนะนำให้เพิ่มรายละเอียดการเรียกเก็บเงิน (billing details) เพื่อให้ address verification service ตรวจสอบ

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cvn": "123",
      "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "skip_three_ds": true,
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description examples",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Response - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "PAYMENT_ID",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co"
        },
        "billing_information": { // Fill these up for Address Verification Service
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}

หากคุณได้รับข้อผิดพลาด SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN แสดงว่าคุณไม่ได้รับอนุญาตให้ข้าม 3DS โปรดขอเปิดใช้งาน Optional 3DS จาก Xendit dashboard

{
    "error_code": "SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN",
    "message": "Non 3DS card payment requests is not allowed. Please activate the feature on Xendit dashboard before proceeding"
}

หากต้องการดึงรายละเอียดการชำระเงิน (ข้อความแสดงข้อผิดพลาดโดยละเอียด, รหัส และ network_transaction_id) จากธุรกรรม โปรดดูวิธีการดึง authorization data สำหรับการชำระเงินด้วยบัตร
SeoTitle: ชำระเงินโดยไม่ต้องมีการยืนยันตัวตน (ไม่มี 3DS2)

Title: Pago sin authentication (no 3DS2)
Content:
Omitir la authentication (3DS2) requiere verificaciones de riesgo adicionales debido a su naturaleza riesgosa.

Xendit recomienda realizar la authentication (3DS2) cuando el comprador esté presente, para prevenir posibles contracargos.

Para habilitar la authentication opcional, solicite Optional 3DS en el Xendit dashboard.

Realice un pago con tarjeta sin 3D Secure. Útil para transacciones de confianza o transacciones en tarjetas para las cuales la authentication (3DS2) no está disponible. No podrá detectar si una tarjeta es compatible con 3DS2 antes de intentar realizar 3DS2.
Tenga en cuenta que las tarjetas de Canadá, el Reino Unido y los Estados Unidos a veces no son compatibles con 3DS2; para estas tarjetas, sugerimos agregar detalles de facturación para que sean verificados por el servicio de verificación de dirección.

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cvn": "123",
      "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "skip_three_ds": true,
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description examples",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Response - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:56:10.879Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "PAYMENT_ID",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper_email@domain.co"
        },
        "billing_information": { // Rellene estos campos para el Address Verification Service
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}

Si recibe el SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN error, no se le permite omitir 3DS; solicite Optional 3DS desde el Xendit dashboard.

{
    "error_code": "SKIP_3DS_FORBIDDEN",
    "message": "Las requests de pago con tarjeta sin 3DS no están permitidas. Por favor, active la función en el Xendit dashboard antes de continuar"
}

Para obtener los detalles del pago (mensajes de error detallados, códigos y network_transaction_id) de la transacción, siga cómo obtener los datos de authorization para pagos con tarjeta.
